ksa_text: Develop and maintain data and AI program plans, including scope definition, data governance frameworks, standards and policies, workforce requirements assessment, and resource allocation strategies.

dcwf.top_element_label: Knowledge of program protection planning to include information technology (IT) supply chain security/risk management policies, anti-tampering techniques, and requirements.

ddat.top_element_label: Capability building for digital, data and technology

eu_ai_act.top_element_label: Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems

nist_ai_rmf.top_element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.

top_anchors.element_label: Policies, processes, procedures, and practices across the organization related to the mapping, measuring, and managing of AI risks are in place, transparent, and implemented effectively.
Obligations of deployers of high-risk AI systems
Capability building for digital, data and technology
Knowledge of program protection planning to include information technology (IT) supply chain security/risk management policies, anti-tampering techniques, and requirements.

pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA OP-T-001 (OP, Task) maps to Health Informatics Specialist scope as moderate fit. Composite score 0.4388 clears the moderate fit threshold of 0.43. Top framework anchors: nist_ai_rmf=0.439, eu_ai_act=0.432, onet=0.425. Seniority fit: appropriate; content reflects IC-to-senior-IC execution work within health informatics, clinical data analysis, and healthcare BI.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: P2 include upheld. Score 0.4388 for moderate fit domain is consistent with ANL IC-level scope. No internal contradictions identified.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: External validation: does KSA OP-T-001 (OP, composite 0.4388) appear in published data analyst / BI role profiles and workforce frameworks?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Survey of DDAT Senior Data Analyst and Lead Analyst profiles; operational workflow competencies documented in IC-to-senior-IC analytics roles does not surface this OP-domain content as a core or common requirement for IC-to-senior-IC data analyst roles. Score 0.4388 may reflect incidental framework overlap. Without direct analytics-domain text confirmation, external ground truth does not support inclusion at this signal level.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: P3 include overturned. Insufficient external evidence for OP domain content at composite 0.4388 without confirming text signals. Revised to exclude.

decision_rationale: Single adversarial overturn by P4 external ground truth. Final decision: exclude. Composite 0.4388, domain OP. Medium confidence — one agent challenged and overturned the preliminary assessment.
